items.title: Phát hiện lực lượng biên phòng Trung Quốc bám trụ ở bờ biển suốt 2.000 ngày đêm, lắp đặt khung thép khổng lồ dưới nước, trục vớt hơn 30.000 cổ vật
items.summary: Phát hiện lực lượng biên phòng Trung Quốc bám trụ ở bờ biển suốt 2.000 ngày đêm, lắp đặt khung thép khổng lồ dưới nước, trục vớt hơn 30.000 cổ vật nguoiquansat.vn

items.title: Cerebras falls 8% after chipmaker forecasts shrinking margin in first earnings report since IPO
items.summary: Cerebras went public on the Nasdaq in May, giving Wall Street access to a pureplay AI company.

items.title: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
items.summary: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

items.title: Bill Gates testimony on Jeffrey Epstein ties released by House oversight panel
items.summary: "I should never have met with Epstein in the first place," Bill Gates told members of the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee.

items.title: CFTC sues Kentucky over actions against prediction markets, making it first red state to face federal scrutiny
items.summary: The commission has now sued nine states in its battle to defend what it sees as its exclusive right to regulate event contracts.

items.title: Traders are loving this cheap way to make big bets against chip stocks
items.summary: Just a day after making new all-time records, the semiconductor sector is down almost 7% and traders are finding a cheap way to bet on a bigger pivot.
